---
name: New Security Agent
about: Propose a focused scanner for a new risk family
title: '[AGENT] '
labels: agent, help wanted
assignees: ''
---

## Risk Family

What should this agent detect?

Examples: MCP tool permission abuse, agent memory poisoning, risky CI workflows, model file supply-chain payloads.

## Why It Matters

What can an attacker do if this is missed?

## Signals to Detect

- [ ] File names or config paths:
- [ ] Code patterns:
- [ ] Risky values or permissions:
- [ ] Safe examples that should not be flagged:

## Suggested Severity

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Test Fixtures

What small vulnerable example should be added to prove the agent works?

## References

Links to docs, advisories, research, incidents, or example vulnerable configs.
